name: Legs Said No, Brain Said Go
description: New year new me they said. My calves filed a formal complaint.

name: Biking to Nowhere in Particular
description: Took a wrong turn and ended up next to a cow. We made eye contact. Neither of us spoke.

name: Chlorine-Scented Therapy Session
description: Swam until my fingers looked like raisins. Felt like a medium-speed dolphin.

name: The Pavement Tried to Kill Me
description: Negative splits achieved through sheer panic about missing dinner.

name: Two-Wheeled Existential Crisis
description: Climbed a hill so steep I had time to reconsider every major life decision. Came back for more.

name: Aggressive Splashing: A Love Story
description: The fast lane crowd gave me looks. I gave them bubbles. No regrets.

name: Jogging in the Rain Like a Sad Movie Montage
description: Absolutely soaked. Shoes went squeak squeak for two days.

name: Sunday Spin: Fueled by Regret and Croissants
description: Stopped at a bakery. Bought three pastries. Ate them on a bench facing a roundabout. Peak sport.

name: Lap 1: Confident. Lap 10: Humbled.
description: Set off like Michael Phelps. By lap 8 I was overtaken by a child with floaties. Character building.

name: Speed Run: Forgot to Charge Garmin
description: Watch died at 3km. Ran purely by vibes and spite. Still PR'd. Do not recommend.

name: The Cold Wind Has a Personal Vendetta
description: Headwind both ways. I'm not saying the Earth is spinning wrong, but I have questions.

name: Aquatic Meditations on Tile Counting
description: There are 47 tiles on the bottom. I've verified this 3 times. Personal best in ceiling-staring.

name: Tempo Tuesday but Make it Suffer
description: Tempo pace felt comfortably uncomfortable until it felt uncomfortably horrifying. 10/10 training.

name: Velodrome Dreams on Suburban Streets
description: Group ride devolved into a race at every traffic light. Nobody admits this. Everyone knows.

name: The Pool is My Confessional
description: Recovery swim. Mostly just floating and pretending I'm an otter.

name: Long Run: A Philosophical Journey
description: Miles 1-10: feeling great. Mile 11: who am I? Mile 13.1: apparently someone who runs half marathons.

name: Commuter Chaos Ride
description: Nearly doored twice. Shouted at by a pigeon. Arrived 4 minutes faster than the bus. Worth it.

name: Masters of the Medium Lane
description: Negotiated an uneasy peace with the guy who keeps doing butterfly in the slow lane.

name: Interval Workout or Medieval Torture?
description: 8x800. Rest periods spent questioning my entire athletic identity. Splits improving. Self-esteem fluctuating.

name: Valentine's Day Suffering for Two
description: Romantic ride. Dropped my partner on the first climb. They said it was fine. It was not fine.

name: Pre-Dawn Pool Party (Just Me)
description: Arrived before the lights were fully on. Shared the pool with my reflection and some ambition.

name: Easy Run: Lied About the Easy Part
description: Zone 2 run. Drifted into zone 4 by accident. Took a scenic detour. Saw a fox. Worth it.

name: The Big Gear Grind
description: Fifty miles and not a single complaint. (This is the complaint.)

name: Breaststroke Boulevard
description: Practiced breaststroke drills until the lifeguard started giving me pity smiles. Progress.

name: Fartlek Friday and I Will Not Apologize for the Name
description: Surged whenever I felt like it. Recovered whenever my lungs demanded it. Pure chaotic joy.

name: March Has Entered the Chat (Coldly)
description: First day of meteorological spring. Hail. Classic.

name: Somewhere Between Floating and Flailing
description: Technique coach would be horrified. The water stayed wet the whole time, so I'm calling it a win.

name: Morning Miles Before My Brain Woke Up
description: Ran 10 miles on autopilot. Brain joined the party around mile 6. Legs had been managing just fine without it.

name: Saddle Sore and Spiritually Enriched
description: 60 miles. Three cafes. Two punctures. One minor breakdown on a beautiful hillside. Deeply recommend.

name: Backstroke: When You Need to See Where You've Been
description: Backstroke only. Bonked the wall only twice. This is growth.

name: Shin Splints Who? Not Today.
description: Took 3 days off. Came back humbled. Legs forgave me eventually. Grudgingly.

name: Hilly Centuries Are a Scam and I Have Proof
description: The route was described as 'rolling'. Rolling. Like a boulder, maybe. Or a punishment wheel.

name: Olympic Distance Prep (Emphasis on Prep)
description: 3800m done. Olympics still not calling. Their loss honestly.

name: Track Tuesday: Where Pride Goes to Die
description: 400s until I couldn't feel my face. Totally normal. This is fine. The track is fine.

name: Spring Is Coming (Probably)
description: Spotted a daffodil. A single, brave daffodil. Rode on with renewed purpose.

name: Turbo Trainer Hell Dimension
description: Stared at the wall for 2 hours. Sweat enough to fill a small aquarium. Outstanding.

name: Accidental 20-Miler (Misread the Plan)
description: Plan said 12 miles. I misread it as 20. My legs also misread it. We are all suffering together.

name: Marathon Countdown Swim: 26 Days Out
description: Active recovery. Floated gently. Thought about carb loading. Mostly thought about pasta.

name: Last Long Ride Before I Taper into Softness
description: 70 miles and I only cried once. On a hilltop. Into the wind. Very cinematic.

name: April Approaches. Calves Tighten.
description: Easy 5k shakeout. Literally nothing hurt. Suspicious.

name: The Swim of Quiet Determination
description: No music, no drama. Just me and 160 lengths and the sound of the filter humming judgmentally.

name: Chasing a Personal Record and Also a Bus
description: Missed the bus. Decided to just run home instead. Surprise PR. Motivation is weird like that.

name: Drizzle Ride: Unfazed and Slightly Damp
description: Light drizzle became moderate drizzle became full shower. Gear: insufficient. Spirit: unbroken.

name: The Lunchtime Dip of Maximum Efficiency
description: 1km in 23 minutes including finding a locker. Corporate athlete behavior.

name: It's Not a Race (It Was a Race)
description: Signed up for a fun run. Finished in top 10. Needed to lie down immediately afterwards. No regrets.

name: Cycling as a Coping Mechanism (Chapter 47)
description: Left with a problem. Returned without it. It may still be there but I am very far away now.

name: The Very Serious Open Water Simulation
description: Practiced sighting by looking up every 4 strokes. Sighted the clock. Sighted the door. Sighted freedom.

name: Taper Tantrums Begin Now
description: Short and easy. Felt like cheating. My legs are suspicious. My coach says trust the process. I do not.

name: Pre-Race Spin: Legs, Please Behave
description: Spinning the legs out. Kept it easy. Treated the bike like it was made of feelings. Delicate and precious.

name: Final Shakeout: The Calm Before the Absolute Chaos
description: 2 miles. Did strides. Felt phenomenal. Race is tomorrow. I am ready. I am terrified. Same thing.
